title: Mesh Asset Manifest
description: Registry of all canonical meshes by anatomical ID, with LOD chains, bounds, and source provenance. Entries are either own-mesh (lods + bounds + provenance required) or composite (composite_children required; mesh fields omitted because the renderer assembles from children at load time). Owned by Asset Pipeline. Authority: Architect. See ADR 0006 (runtime attribution), ADR 0007 (Blender attribution discipline), ADR 0008 (composite entries).

primary_id.description: Primary anatomy-graph identifier this mesh represents. UBERON preferred per ADR 0004; FMA accepted for BodyParts3D-originated meshes pending crosswalk to UBERON. BODY:NNNN reserved for structures with no upstream ontology equivalent.

min.description: AABB minimum corner in mesh-space (x, y, z).

max.description: AABB maximum corner in mesh-space (x, y, z).

level.description: 0 = highest detail; integer LOD index ascending toward coarser meshes.

file.description: Path to the LOD glb, relative to data/canonical/meshes/.

triangle_count.description: Triangle count for this LOD. Reported from the on-disk glb, authoritative source.

byte_size.description: Byte size of this LOD's glb file on disk.

compression.description: Compression applied to this LOD. Phase 1 ships uncompressed; draco/meshopt arrive in later phases.

original_id.description: Source-side identifier if different from the primary id (e.g. BodyParts3D FJ-id).

ingested_at.description: Date the source asset was ingested into the canonical store.

edits.description: Cleanup or processing operations applied (e.g. 'fixed normals', 'welded vertices', 'obj_to_glb_conversion'). LOD0 chain only at the entry level; per-LOD decimate tags live inside the glb's asset.extras.

lods.description: At minimum LOD0; LOD2 strongly recommended for in-viewer assets.

own_mesh_entry.description: Standard own-mesh entry. The anatomical concept is realized by a concrete LOD chain on disk.

composite_children.description: Primary IDs of the constituent meshes that together realize this anatomical concept. Each child must itself appear as an own_mesh_entry in this manifest. The renderer/registry-baker resolves bounds and LODs from the children at load time. See ADR 0008.

material_hint.description: Optional rendering hint. Children may carry their own material_hint values; this is a default at the composite level.

composite_entry.description: Composite entry: the anatomical concept has no own mesh and is realized by referencing constituent child meshes. lods, bounds, and provenance are intentionally absent — they are computed from children at load time, and child attribution carries forward per ADR 0006.

entry.description: A manifest entry is exactly one of: own_mesh_entry (with lods + bounds + provenance) or composite_entry (with composite_children). Mixing the two shapes in a single entry is incoherent and rejected.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of bake. Fixed to a deterministic value per run for byte-stable re-emission.

entries.description: All canonical mesh entries. Order is deterministic (sorted by id) for byte-stable re-emission.
